content.content:
1→package provider
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"encoding/json"
     6→	"net/http"
     7→	"net/http/httptest"
     8→	"os"
     9→	"strings"
    10→	"testing"
    11→)
    12→
    13→func TestGitLabProvider_CreateOrUpdateMR(t *testing.T) {
    14→	tests := []struct {
    15→		name           string
    16→		config         MRConfig
    17→		envURL         string
    18→		envToken       string
    19→		mockResponse   string
    20→		mockStatus     int
    21→		existingMRs    []gitLabMR
    22→		expectedResult *MRResult
    23→		expectError    bool
    24→	}{
    25→		{
    26→			name: "creates new MR successfully",
    27→			config: MRConfig{
    28→				RepoURL:      "https://gitlab.example.com/namespace/project.git",
    29→				SourceBranch: "workflow/java17-migration/20250905",
    30→				TargetBranch: "refs/heads/main",
    31→				Title:        "Transflow: Java 17 Migration",
    32→				Description:  "Applied OpenRewrite recipe for Java 17 migration",
    33→				Labels:       []string{"ploy", "tfl"},
    34→			},
    35→			envURL:   "https://gitlab.example.com",
    36→			envToken: "glpat-test-token",
    37→			mockResponse: `{
    38→				"id": 123,
    39→				"iid": 1,
    40→				"web_url": "https://gitlab.example.com/namespace/project/-/merge_requests/1",
    41→				"title": "Transflow: Java 17 Migration"
    42→			}`,
    43→			mockStatus:  201,
    44→			existingMRs: []gitLabMR{}, // no existing MRs
    45→			expectedResult: &MRResult{
    46→				MRURL:   "https://gitlab.example.com/namespace/project/-/merge_requests/1",
    47→				MRID:    1,
    48→				Created: true,
    49→			},
    50→			expectError: false,
    51→		},
    52→		{
    53→			name: "updates existing MR successfully",
    54→			config: MRConfig{
    55→				RepoURL:      "https://gitlab.example.com/namespace/project.git",
    56→				SourceBranch: "workflow/java17-migration/20250905",
    57→				TargetBranch: "refs/heads/main",
    58→				Title:        "Transflow: Java 17 Migration (Updated)",
    59→				Description:  "Updated: Applied OpenRewrite recipe for Java 17 migration with healing",
    60→				Labels:       []string{"ploy", "tfl"},
    61→			},
    62→			envURL:   "https://gitlab.example.com",
    63→			envToken: "glpat-test-token",
    64→			mockResponse: `{
    65→				"id": 123,
    66→				"iid": 1,
    67→				"web_url": "https://gitlab.example.com/namespace/project/-/merge_requests/1",
    68→				"title": "Transflow: Java 17 Migration (Updated)"
    69→			}`,
    70→			mockStatus: 200,
    71→			existingMRs: []gitLabMR{
    72→				{
    73→					ID:           123,
    74→					IID:          1,
    75→					SourceBranch: "workflow/java17-migration/20250905",
    76→					TargetBranch: "main",
    77→					State:        "opened",
    78→				},
    79→			},
    80→			expectedResult: &MRResult{
    81→				MRURL:   "https://gitlab.example.com/namespace/project/-/merge_requests/1",
    82→				MRID:    1,
    83→				Created: false,
    84→			},
    85→			expectError: false,
    86→		},
    87→		{
    88→			name: "fails with invalid repository URL",
    89→			config: MRConfig{
    90→				RepoURL:      "not-a-valid-url",
    91→				SourceBranch: "workflow/test/20250905",
    92→				TargetBranch: "refs/heads/main",
    93→				Title:        "Test MR",
    94→				Description:  "Test description",
    95→				Labels:       []string{"ploy"},
    96→			},
    97→			envURL:      "https://gitlab.example.com",
    98→			envToken:    "glpat-test-token",
    99→			expectError: true,
   100→		},
   101→		{
   102→			name: "fails with missing GitLab token",
   103→			config: MRConfig{
   104→				RepoURL:      "https://gitlab.example.com/namespace/project.git",
   105→				SourceBranch: "workflow/test/20250905",
   106→				TargetBranch: "refs/heads/main",
   107→				Title:        "Test MR",
   108→				Description:  "Test description",
   109→				Labels:       []string{"ploy"},
   110→			},
   111→			envURL:      "https://gitlab.example.com",
   112→			envToken:    "", // empty token
   113→			expectError: true,
   114→		},
   115→	}
   116→
   117→	for _, tt := range tests {
   118→		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
   119→			// Set up environment variables
   120→			if tt.envURL != "" {
   121→				os.Setenv("GITLAB_URL", tt.envURL)
   122→			} else {
   123→				os.Unsetenv("GITLAB_URL")
   124→			}
   125→			
   126→			if tt.envToken != "" {
   127→				os.Setenv("GITLAB_TOKEN", tt.envToken)
   128→			} else {
   129→				os.Unsetenv("GITLAB_TOKEN")
   130→			}
   131→			
   132→			defer func() {
   133→				os.Unsetenv("GITLAB_URL")
   134→				os.Unsetenv("GITLAB_TOKEN")
   135→			}()
   136→
   137→			// Create mock GitLab server
   138→			server := httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
   139→				// Check authorization header
   140→				if tt.envToken != "" {
   141→					expectedAuth := "Bearer " + tt.envToken
   142→					if r.Header.Get("Authorization") != expectedAuth {
   143→						w.WriteHeader(http.StatusUnauthorized)
   144→						return
   145→					}
   146→				}
   147→
   148→				// Handle different API endpoints
   149→				if strings.Contains(r.URL.Path, "/merge_requests") && r.Method == "GET" {
   150→					// List existing MRs
   151→					response, _ := json.Marshal(tt.existingMRs)
   152→					w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
   153→					w.Write(response)
   154→					return
   155→				}
   156→
   157→				if strings.Contains(r.URL.Path, "/merge_requests") {
   158→					w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
   159→					w.WriteHeader(tt.mockStatus)
   160→					w.Write([]byte(tt.mockResponse))
   161→					return
   162→				}
   163→
   164→				w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNotFound)
   165→			}))
   166→			defer server.Close()
   167→
   168→			// Override GitLab URL to use mock server
   169→			if tt.envURL != "" {
   170→				os.Setenv("GITLAB_URL", server.URL)
   171→			}
   172→
   173→			// Create GitLab provider
   174→			provider := NewGitLabProvider()
   175→
   176→			// Test CreateOrUpdateMR
   177→			ctx := context.Background()
   178→			result, err := provider.CreateOrUpdateMR(ctx, tt.config)
   179→
   180→			if tt.expectError {
   181→				if err == nil {
   182→					t.Errorf("expected error but got nil")
   183→				}
   184→				return
   185→			}
   186→
   187→			if err != nil {
   188→				t.Errorf("unexpected error: %v", err)
   189→				return
   190→			}
   191→
   192→			if result == nil {
   193→				t.Errorf("expected result but got nil")
   194→				return
   195→			}
   196→
   197→			if result.MRURL != tt.expectedResult.MRURL {
   198→				t.Errorf("expected MR URL %s, got %s", tt.expectedResult.MRURL, result.MRURL)
   199→			}
   200→
   201→			if result.MRID != tt.expectedResult.MRID {
   202→				t.Errorf("expected MR ID %d, got %d", tt.expectedResult.MRID, result.MRID)
   203→			}
   204→
   205→			if result.Created != tt.expectedResult.Created {
   206→				t.Errorf("expected Created %t, got %t", tt.expectedResult.Created, result.Created)
   207→			}
   208→		})
   209→	}
   210→}
   211→
   212→func TestGitLabProvider_ValidateConfiguration(t *testing.T) {
   213→	tests := []struct {
   214→		name        string
   215→		envURL      string
   216→		envToken    string
   217→		expectError bool
   218→	}{
   219→		{
   220→			name:        "valid configuration",
   221→			envURL:      "https://gitlab.example.com",
   222→			envToken:    "glpat-test-token",
   223→			expectError: false,
   224→		},
   225→		{
   226→			name:        "missing GitLab token",
   227→			envURL:      "https://gitlab.example.com",
   228→			envToken:    "",
   229→			expectError: true,
   230→		},
   231→		{
   232→			name:        "uses default GitLab URL when not specified",
   233→			envURL:      "",
   234→			envToken:    "glpat-test-token",
   235→			expectError: false,
   236→		},
   237→	}
   238→
   239→	for _, tt := range tests {
   240→		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
   241→			// Set up environment variables
   242→			if tt.envURL != "" {
   243→				os.Setenv("GITLAB_URL", tt.envURL)
   244→			} else {
   245→				os.Unsetenv("GITLAB_URL")
   246→			}
   247→			
   248→			if tt.envToken != "" {
   249→				os.Setenv("GITLAB_TOKEN", tt.envToken)
   250→			} else {
   251→				os.Unsetenv("GITLAB_TOKEN")
   252→			}
   253→			
   254→			defer func() {
   255→				os.Unsetenv("GITLAB_URL")
   256→				os.Unsetenv("GITLAB_TOKEN")
   257→			}()
   258→
   259→			provider := NewGitLabProvider()
   260→			err := provider.ValidateConfiguration()
   261→
   262→			if tt.expectError && err == nil {
   263→				t.Errorf("expected error but got nil")
   264→			}
   265→
   266→			if !tt.expectError && err != nil {
   267→				t.Errorf("unexpected error: %v", err)
   268→			}
   269→		})
   270→	}
   271→}
   272→
   273→func TestExtractGitLabProject(t *testing.T) {
   274→	tests := []struct {
   275→		name        string
   276→		repoURL     string
   277→		expected    string
   278→		expectError bool
   279→	}{
   280→		{
   281→			name:        "standard GitLab HTTPS URL",
   282→			repoURL:     "https://gitlab.example.com/namespace/project.git",
   283→			expected:    "namespace/project",
   284→			expectError: false,
   285→		},
   286→		{
   287→			name:        "GitLab URL without .git suffix",
   288→			repoURL:     "https://gitlab.example.com/namespace/project",
   289→			expected:    "namespace/project",
   290→			expectError: false,
   291→		},
   292→		{
   293→			name:        "nested namespace",
   294→			repoURL:     "https://gitlab.example.com/group/subgroup/project.git",
   295→			expected:    "group/subgroup/project",
   296→			expectError: false,
   297→		},
   298→		{
   299→			name:        "invalid URL",
   300→			repoURL:     "not-a-valid-url",
   301→			expected:    "",
   302→			expectError: true,
   303→		},
   304→		{
   305→			name:        "GitHub URL (valid format but not GitLab)",
   306→			repoURL:     "https://github.com/user/repo.git",
   307→			expected:    "user/repo",
   308→			expectError: false,
   309→		},
   310→	}
   311→
   312→	for _, tt := range tests {
   313→		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
   314→			result, err := extractGitLabProject(tt.repoURL)
   315→
   316→			if tt.expectError && err == nil {
   317→				t.Errorf("expected error but got nil")
   318→			}
   319→
   320→			if !tt.expectError && err != nil {
   321→				t.Errorf("unexpected error: %v", err)
   322→			}
   323→
   324→			if result != tt.expected {
   325→				t.Errorf("expected %s, got %s", tt.expected, result)
   326→			}
   327→		})
   328→	}
   329→}
   330→
   331→// gitLabMR represents a GitLab merge request response from API
   332→type gitLabMR struct {
   333→	ID           int    `json:"id"`
   334→	IID          int    `json:"iid"`
   335→	SourceBranch string `json:"source_branch"`
   336→	TargetBranch string `json:"target_branch"`
   337→	State        string `json:"state"`
   338→	WebURL       string `json:"web_url,omitempty"`
   339→}
